Chay web navegador WebAudio nisqata mana yanapachkanchu.
Chay navegadorkuna yanapasqa: Chrome, Firefox, Safari, Edge.

settings.title: Chuqllay

engines.chiptune3Desc: 20+ tracker formatukunatam (.xm/.mod/.it/.s3m/.mptm/.umx …)ta q'imin. Huk formatukunapaq FFmpegman kutichin.
engines.bassoonDesc: .xm / .mod nisqallanllata ruwan. Huk formatkunapaqqa Chiptune3man, chaymanta FFmpegman kutipun.
engines.ffmpegDesc: Tukuy ruwaykunata MP3man t'ikraq. Ancha yanapakuy, qallariypi unay.

settings.engineDesc: Imaymana kuyuq wankilli nisqata akllay. Chiptune3 nisqa allin tracker formatukunapaq yanapakuyta munasqa.

intro.introWelcome: Ñawpaq punkun, 68+ formatokunapi tracker taki kunanman — MOD, XM, MPTM, UMX hina — hatun huñuymanta
intro.tutorialStep3Body: Tracker Player nisqaqa takita kawsarichin iskay yanapakuq rikch'aykunawan:
intro.tutorialStep5Body: Huk'aytaq yuyaykunaqta qillqayta ruway, astawan ruwanakunata kicharinaykipaq:
intro.tutorialStep4Body: Tracker Player nisqa ancha chaninchanapaqmi. Uyarichiykunataqa ruway kay gear icon (hawana bar) nisqapi chayri Settings ear (lluq'i ladopi) nisqapi:
intro.introWhatBody3: Mask'ay playlist mask'ayta ch'usaqchaspa, audio visualización, usuario cuenta sistemas internacionalización apoyo, Tracker Player huk hunt'a ecosistema peripheral características alrededor del player core, ruwasqa, munaspa usuarios disfrutachun unique charm tracker música mana ima técnico background.
intro.tutorialStep6Tip: Allin yuyay: Móvil nisqapi, Tracker Player nisqata wasi pantallaykiman yapay, huk nativo app hina ruwanapaq. Progressive Web App hina allinmi llank'an, mana internet kaqpi cachewan.
intro.tutorialStep1Body: Ñawpaq playlist nisqa Tracker Player nisqap sunqunmi. Hanaqpi maskhana barrawanqa trackkunata maskhay, sutinwan utaq titulunwan. Maskhana barrapa uraypin, atiywan filtrokunata tarinki.
intro.tutorialLead: Kay ñan ñawpaqmanta qatiqnin Tracker Player nisqapaq tukuy ima ruwanankunata, ñawpaq takiykita tarisqamanta, llamk'ayniykiman hina uyarichinata ruwanaykipaq.
intro.tutorialStep2Body: Ñawpaq taki playlistpi kaqta ñit'iy, qallarichinapaq. Reproduktorqa usqhaylla qallarichin — askha archivosqa huk segundomanta aswan pisillapi qallarichin. Huk taki waqachkaqtiyki, kaykunata rikunki:
intro.introWhatBody1: Tracker Player nisqa, kichasqa pukyu personal proyecto, tracker musikap sumaq kayninta moderno browserpi rikuchinapaq ruwasqa. Mana musuq audio enginechu, aswanqa allin kichasqa pukyu proyectospi yapasqa wiñarichiywan chaymanta tinkiywan ruwasqa, hunt'a usuario experiencia sistemata ruwaspa.
intro.creditsLibopenmptDesc: Desarrollado por los contribuyentes de OpenMPT. La biblioteca de reproducción de tracker de código abierto definitiva, que admite más de 68 formatos de módulos con una precisión inigualable. Modificamos el código fuente C de libopenmpt — añadiendo un waveform_processor personalizado que captura datos PCM por canal dentro del mezclador antes de la salida final — y lo compilamos a WebAssembly mediante Emscripten. Nuestra compilación WASM modificada reemplaza el binario precompilado de la versión original incluido con Chiptune3, habilitando los osciloscopios por canal y formando la base de decodificación para los más de 68 formatos.
intro.introTrackerBody3: Kunan p'unchawkama, tracker takiyqa wiñaypaq kawsan demoscene ayllu lliwpi hinaspa retro computación munakuqkunapipas. Tracker Playerqa munayninmi aswan runakunaman kay sapalla kapuq sumaq takiyta riqsichiyta, computadorapa takiy willaynin apaq, musuq uyariqwan hinaspa yanapakuy allinwan.
intro.changelogIntro: Tracker Player nisqanmanta aswan hatun t'ikrasqa karqan, sasachakuy MOD/XM uyarichina hinamanta. Kaymi hatun ruwaykunap pachan:
intro.introWelcomeNote: Tracker Player maná huk pukllaypaq apaykachanallamanta aswan — huk hunt'a ruwayniyuq tracker taki plataforma, sumaq, kutichikuq uyaqnin, tiempopura patrón rikuchiy, sapa kanal oscilloscopio, hukmi ruwanakuna ruwasqa takikunata tarinapaq, kusikunapaq, ima aparatupipis mana sasachakuywan.
intro.introWhatBody2Tail: , huk browser-pi Amiga MOD/XM tracker, Steffest-pa JavaScript puro qillqasqa, tracker uyarichiy ruwayta chiqapmanta kutichin. Kay tiyana patapi, proyectoqa Chiptune3 (libopenmpt-pa hawa WebAssembly kuyuchina) nisqatawan FFmpeg servidor-pi transcodificación nisqata, formatu yanapayta MOD/XM-pa qallariyninmanta 68-manta aswan formatukama mast'arin.
intro.introTrackerBody1: Takiq taki (module taki icha MOD taki nisqapas) huk sapalla taki digital forma, 1980 watakuna qhipa pachapi Comodore Amiga nisqapi yurisqa. MP3 icha streaming audio nisqamanta t'aqasqa, tracker archivosqa taki qillqata (notas, patrones, efectos) ima, instrumento muestras ima — huk taki proyecto archivo kikinpi. Kaymi tracker archivosqa ancha compacto kan, taki complejidad ancha atipaspa.
intro.creditsVueDesc: Vue nisqan JavaScript framework progresivo, chaytaqa llamk'achinchik component-based UI nisqapaq. Vuepa Composition API-n, reactivity system-n, imaymana single-file components-n ima, ruwanapaq hinaspa mantenimientota ruwanapaq complejo player interfazta, limpio, modular código nisqawan.
intro.tutorialStep6Body: Sapa taki Tracker Playerpiqa huk wiñay, rakinakuna URLniyuqmi. Huk taki waqachkaqtin, navegadorniykip direccionninmanta t'inkita qillqay — /song/123456/filename.mod hinam rikch'akun. Amigokunaman apachiy, redes socialespi churay, utaq qhipaman waqaychanaykipaq marcay. T'inkinqa huk takillatam sapakuti kicharinqa.
intro.creditsWebGLDesc: Ñawpaq web qhawana API nisqan, real-time tracker patrón qhawanata ruwaq. Patrón nota willakunaqa WebGL canvasman 60 fps nisqapi apamun, ProTracker hinas FastTracker II hina tracker editor clásico nisqakunapa scrolling-nota qhawananman hina ruwaspa.
intro.creditsIntro: Tracker Player nisqaqa ancha sumaq open-source ecosistema patapi sayasqa. Llapa 135,400+ taki libreríanchista The Mod Archive nisqamantam hurqunchik — internetpi tracker takikunapaq aswan allin qillqa wasi. Kay proyecto atiykachanapaq llank'aq sapa yanapaqkunata ancha agradecekuyku.
intro.creditsTailwindDesc: Tailwind nisqan, CSS framework nisqan, ruwaykunata allichanapaq llamk'achisqa. Tailwindpa diseño token sistemanta, 16-thema arquitecturanchikta atichin — sapa llimphi, llanthu, chaymanta saywa, activo themaman hina adaptakun, CSS propiedad personalizadas nisqawan, Tailwind configuraciónninchikmanta ruwasqa.
intro.creditsModArchiveDesc: Huk'uchataq internetpi qhapaq takiykuna waqaychana, 150.000-manta aswan módulokunata qhawachispa, waranqa artistakunamanta tawa chunka watakunapi. Mod Archive nisqaqa takiykunapaq sapalla fuenteñin bibliotecanchiqpi, hinallataq tracking comunidadpaq mana reemplazay atina institución.
intro.creditsNuxtDesc: Vue.js meta-framework nisqanchik ñawpaqninpi chaymanta qhipa kaqpi llank'ananchikpaq. Nuxtqa servidorpi rikuchiyta qun utqaylla p'anqakuna chaqnasqanpaq chaymanta SEOpaq, Nitro servidor API ñankunapaq, SQLite willañiqi tinkiy, chaymanta kikinmanta código rak'iy allin ruwaypaq.
intro.creditsEmscriptenDesc: LLVM-pi t'inkuna wask'a ruwanakuna, C/C++ qillqata WebAssemblyman t'ikraq. Emscripten nisqata apaykachanchik patchasqa libopenmpt nisqanchikta — chaypi waveform_processor nisqa ruwanakunawan — huk WASM móduloman t'ikranapaq, chayqa huk qillqapi kaq, browserpa AudioWorklet nisqan ukhupi, qaylla-utqaylla ruwanakunata ruwan.
intro.creditsBassoonDesc: Steffest-pa rurasqan. Amiga MOD nisqamanta XM tracker nisqakunamanta — ProTracker nisqamanta FastTracker II nisqamanta — JavaScript nisqapi qillqasqa, chiqap web-kaqpi kaqmanta ruwasqa. BassoonTracker nisqaqa kay ruwayta qallarichisqa chiqap, q'uñi waqayta qun, 4-kanal MOD nisqakunapaq chaymanta achka-kanal XM nisqakunapaq hunt'asqa yanapaywan, envelopes, filtros, efectos nisqakunatawan.
intro.creditsAudioWorkletDesc: W3C Web Audio API nisqa kamachiy, huk sapa pachapi kaq hilarpi (dedicated real-time thread) ukhupi, pisi unayta, mana pantasqa ruwaywan audio ruwayta atichin. AudioWorklet nisqapi Chiptune3 kamachiyninchik libopenmpt WASM compilado nisqata purichin, hatun UI hilarmanta (main UI thread) sapallanpi, imaymana ruwaypi kaspapas, mana hark'asqa uyarinapaq.
intro.introTrackerBody2: Kay ñawpaqta Karsten Obarski-pa Ultimate Soundtracker-nin 1987 watapi ruwarqan, chaymantaqa demoscene nisqapi utqaylla wiñarirqan — chaypi programadores, músicos, artistas huñunakuspa sumaq audiovisual ruwaykunata ruwanankupaq. Achka watakunapi, achka tracker formatokunam yurimurqan, sapa huknin ima atisqanmanta astawan ruwayta munarqan: aswan canales, aswan allin efectos, instrumentos sintetizados, VST plugin yanapay, hinallataq huk huñusqa mezcla atiykunapas. Kunan pachaqa, tracker mundo nisqaqa tukuy pachantinpi kawsashan, sapa p'unchaw musuq takikuna The Mod Archive nisqa sitiokunapi lluqsispa.
intro.creditsChiptune3Desc: DrSnuggles sutichasqan — AudioWorklet nisqapi libopenmptta ch'utichispa, 68+ tracker formatokunata wakichiyta atichinapaq JavaScript qillqa kamayuq. Kay ruwaypaqqa, AudioWorklet procesorta allinchaspa, sapa kanalpa waveform willaykunata hurquspa (achka kanal oscilloscopokunata atichinapaq), automatic gain control yapaspa, chaymanta trackta utqaylla tikranapaq race-conditionta kallpachaspa. Chiptune3 nisqaqa browserpa Web Audio API nisqanwan, patchasqa libopenmpt ruwayninchikpaq kichay atiyninwan t'inkin, chaymanta ñuqanchikpaq allin qallariy motor.
tutorialStep1Filters: Ch'usaq Filter — Ñit'iy huk multi-akllana llika kichariy tukuy formatokunamanta. Preset botonkunata llamk'achiy usqhaylla akllanapaq: Bassoon (MOD/XM), Major Tracker (MOD/XM/IT/S3M/MPTM), Chiptune3 Tukuy (56 formatokuna), utaq Tukuy Apaykachasqa.
Channels Suyu — Uchuyachiy kanal yupaywan: 4 kanalkuna (clásico MOD pacha), 8 kanalkuna, utaq 8+ kanalkuna (kunan multitrack).
Ch'usaq Ch'usay — Ch'usay ch'usaq ch'usay: uchuy (<100KB), chawpi, utaq hatun (>1MB).
Tracker Sutichay Suyu — Huk tracker sutita qillqay (ahinataq "Impulse Tracker", "FastTracker") huk software nisqawan ruwasqa takikunata tarinaykipaq.
Ajllaykuna — Waqtichayta ID, sutichay, willañiqisuti, chhikachay, utaq hukñiq p'unchawmanta, wichariq utaq urayariq ñiqiwan kamachiy.
Akllayta Akllana — T'ikray puraq Tukuq takikunapi, Munasqaykikunapi, ima Pukllay Wiñaykipipas.
tutorialStep2Details: Willay Willañi — Suti, takiq, formatu, kanal yupay, taki yupay rikuchisqa pukllay kamachiqkunap hanaqninpi.
Pukllay/Sayay & Puriy — Hatun pukllay/sayay botónwan, pukllay modo akllanawan: Chaupichay (random), Ordenpi (secuencial), Hukta muyuchiy, Kunanmanta qhipaman sayay.
Qatiq ñan — Qatiq ñanman kikinmanta pasay, utaq akllasqayki pukllay rikch'ayki ruwachun.
Uyariy & Puririy — Uyariyta qallariyta qallariywan, takiyta maskhay, pachata qallariyta/qallariyta rikuchiy.
Llika Butun — Ñit'iy sunqu kaqman takiyta yapaykuy munasqaykikunaman (cuenta necesitan).
Descargar — Guarda el archivo tracker original en tu dispositivo.
T'inku ModArchive — Kichariy trackpa p'anqanta The Mod Archive nisqapi, astawan yachanapaq, ayllu rimaykunata qhawanapaq.

Track Info Modal — Qhaway imaymana willakuykunata: tracker sutinta, p'unchawta, unayta, contenedor layata, taki ukhukunata, canal yupayta, instrumentokunata, muestrakunata, kamachiykunata, patronkunata, ima churasqa willakuyta composerpa.
tutorialStep3Details: Qhawaq rikuchiq — Qhaway huk tracker patrón nisqamanta willakuykunata, WebGL nisqawan ruwasqa, sumaq llamp'u ruwayninta. Sapa columna huk canalta rikuchin, sapa fila huk nota ruwayta. Notakuna, instrumentokuna, volumen, ima kamachiykuna ima rikuchisqa kanku — huk clásico tracker editor nisqahina. Click patrón toggle nisqapi vertical (tradicional) chaymanta horizontal (ancha pantalla) layouterman t'ikranaykipaq.

Osciloscopio Sapa Canal — Urayta pukllaqpa, rikunki huk llika rikuchiykunata — sapa kanal audio kananpaq takiypi. Kaykunaqa ruwasqa kanku libopenmpt nisqapi C-nivel procesador waveforma nisqawan, chaymi hurqun sapa kanal audio uyarichiyta tukuyninpi chaqrusqamanta. Qhaway sapa kanal waveforma tiempu realpi puriqta, qususpa rikch'ay maki qillqata imaynatam takiy ruwasqa — kick tinya kanal 1pi, bajo kanal 2pi, qhapaq kanal 3pi, hukkunapipas.
Iskay rikchaykunata wañuchiy/hatariy atikunmi Churanakunapi ruway atiyta utaq munasqaykita hina.
tutorialStep4Settings: Pukllay Kamayuq — Akllay BassoonTracker (clásico MOD/XM), Chiptune3 (yuyaykusqa, 20+ formatokuna), utaq FFmpeg (ancha formatokunata yanapaspa sirvip patan tikraywan).

Tema — Akllay 16 llimp'i temakunamanta. K'anchay temakunaqa: K'anchay, Retro (Solarized), Océano (Q'umir q'illu), Sach'a (Q'umir), Fresa (Q'usñi), Q'umir, Q'usñi, Cyan, Q'illu, Uqi. Tutayay temakunaqa: Tutayay, Chawpi (Suni Q'umir), Quri (Yana & Quri), Q'umir, Puka, Q'umir.
Simi — 52 simi uñanchaykuna. Munasqayki chayllapi waqaychasqa.
Uyarina — Huk willaynin uyarina patata churay chaymanta munaspaqa sapa takiypi atipaykachay.
Loudness Normalization — Lliwta ruwaqta ruwaytaqa kikinmanta allichan, uyarinapaq hukniraqta kananpaq (qallariypi kachkan).
Lliwi Q'aytu Q'aytuy — Tracker takikunaqa wiñaypaq q'aytukunku. Huk lliwi q'aytu q'aytuyta churay mana tukukuq uyarinamanta hark'anapaq (kikinmanta: 1).
T'inkunakuna rikuchiy — Qawachiy icha pakay chawpi rikuchiyta, patrón rikuchiyta, imayna yaykuyta.
tutorialStep5Details: Munaychasqa — Sonqochay mayqin takitapas munaychasqayki listaman waqaychanaykipaq, taki pukyu akllanaman haywayninkichu.
Pukllay Wiñay — Sapa taki takisqayki kikinmanta qillqakun. Wiñayniykita qhaway takikunata musuqmanta tarinaykipaq.
Wakinakuy Antañikikunapura — Munasqaykikuna willaykunapas qatiqkunantinmi purin antañikikunapura yaykuptiki.
Pakta — Cuenta yuyaychayninpiqa munasqakunatawan ñawpaq ruwaykunatawan waqaychan. Mana ima sapaq willaykunatapas huñunchu, mana rakinchunchu.

items: Integrated libopenmpt as a third playback engine, supporting 68+ tracker formats with bit-accurate playback.
Developed custom waveform_processor in C — modifications to libopenmpt's source code enabling per-channel audio extraction before final mixing.
Compiled libopenmpt + waveform_processor to WebAssembly via Emscripten for in-browser execution.
Built WebGL-based pattern view with both vertical (traditional tracker) and horizontal (widescreen) display modes.
Added per-channel oscilloscope visualization — live scrolling waveforms for each audio channel, powered by the custom waveform processor.
Created adaptive font sizing and pixel-perfect text rendering in WebGL visualizer.
Implemented hard clipping protection to prevent uint8 texture overflow in waveform visualizers.
Added multi-channel signal normalization and noise gating for cleaner oscilloscope displays.
Fixed timing drift in Chiptune3 AudioWorklet for rock-solid playback synchronization.
Expanded format support to 56 formats in Chiptune3 + additional formats in libopenmpt.
Added user account system with registration, login, and favorites/history sync.
Added track info modal with comprehensive metadata display.
Added download modal — download original tracker files or convert to MP3.
Added horizontal layout mode for pattern display (transposed channel and row data).
Added theme-specific row highlight alpha variables for WebGL shader backgrounds.
Developed Chiptune3 — a custom WebAssembly audio engine supporting 20+ tracker formats with per-channel output.
Implemented AudioWorklet-based playback for low-latency, glitch-free audio.
Built dual-canvas oscilloscope system — spectrum analyzer (frequency domain) and waveform display (time domain).
Added WebGL rendering pipeline for high-performance visualizations.
Introduced 16 color themes with CSS custom properties and runtime switching.
Built the ear-bar sidebar (InfoDrawer) with 5 panels: Guide, Settings, Theme, Language, Account.
Added 52-language internationalization system with locale detection and fallback chains.
Implemented responsive mobile layout with safe-area support and collapsible navigation.
Added playlist search, format filter panel with preset buttons, and multi-field sort.
Built pagination controls with first/prev/-10/+10/next/last navigation.
Initial release as 'MOD Player' — a web-based player for MOD and XM tracker music.
Integrated BassoonTracker by Steffest as the core playback engine — browser-based Amiga tracker in JavaScript.
Built playlist interface with table view showing track number, title, and filename.
Added basic playback controls: play, pause, next, playback mode selection.
Created Settings panel with volume control, max loop setting, and display toggles.
Implemented local storage for user preferences (theme, language, settings).
Added introductory guide section explaining what tracker music is and how to use the player.
Sourced initial music library from CoolModFiles.com and The Mod Archive.
Designed the responsive layout foundation: header, player column, playlist column, footer.
Added dark and light theme support with CSS custom properties.

introFeatures: 135.400+ hark'ay taki willañiqinakap qillqatanaka, 68+ formatonakata, 4 canal MOD-nakata 256 canal epiconakakama.
Pachakuna kimsa kuyuq rikch'aq: BassoonTracker (JS ñawpaq), Chiptune3 (AudioWorklet + libopenmpt WASM), hinallataq FFmpeg (servidor ukhupi tikray) — sapa willañiqiqpaq kikillanmanta akllasqa.
WebGL nisqa pachapi qhawachisqa tracker patrón qhawana — taki qillqakunaqa tracker ruwaq editor nisqahina purichkan.
Osciloscopios de forma de onda por canal — rikukuy cada canalpa audio lluqsiyninta huk kawsay waveforma puriqninpi, C-nivel waveforma hurquna kamachisqa.
Diseñu responsivu que s'adapta fermosamente a cualquier pantalla: escritoriu, tableta o teléfonu — incluyendo mou de patrón horizontal pa pantalla ancha.
16 sumaq ruwasqa llimp'i temakuna — ch'uwa k'anchaymanta tuta yana, inti q'uñi, q'uri q'illu, chaymanta tukuy chawpipi kaqkuna.
52 simi rimaykuna interfazpi — taki qhapaqta uyarichiqkunaman tukuy pachantinpi.
Maskay atiyniyuq, achka akllay format ch'illiy filtruwan ñawpaq botonkuna (Bassoon, Major Tracker, Chiptune3, Tukuy Apaykachasqa), kanal yupay filtru, achka pampapi t'anta ch'illiy.
Cuenta sistema con qunakuna munasqa pukllay wiñay — tupachiy qillqasqayki tukuy aparatuykipi.
Takiq wakichisqa taki t'inkikuna — sapa taki huk sapalla URL chaskin, ahinataq /song/123456/filename.mod.
Uraykuy qallariy tracker willakunata utaq MP3-man tikray huk ñit’iyllawan.
P'anel willaykuna qawachiy: sutichay, takiq, qatiq, formatu, kanalkuna, instrumentokuna, muestrakuna, ordenkuna, patronkuna, chaymanta churasqa willay.
Mana qullpa, kichasqa pukyu, llaqtayuq pusayninwan — mana qhatuypa, mana qatipaypa, mana qullqi punkupas.

comments.title: Willaykuna
comments.disabled: Kay qillqasqakuna kay ruwaypi wichuchasqa kachkan.

trackInfo.title: Suti
trackInfo.noMeta: Kay mana willaykunaqa manam kay takipaqchu.
